calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Dean Prober, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Bosco Credit LLC,
Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Latonya Grundy aka Latonya L. Grundy aka Latonya Lavina Grundy for a judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $144,530.88
Prejudgment Interest - $25,368.75
Costs - $475.00
Other Late Charges 462.58
Total judgment in the amount of $170,837.21

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jul-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
